summary: Fresh-context review found four issues in the initial rollout: read-only non-custom fallback, only eight tickets reachable interactively, detail context truncated in interactive mode, and widget-refresh failures escaping after committed tool writes. The implementation was updated to add direct textual detail actions (`edit`, `status`, `dependency`) under `/ticket open detail <ref> ...`, expose every ticket as an interactive open action, render full detail context in interactive mode, and make command/tool widget refresh best-effort. Targeted ticketing verification now passes after the fixes.
